description: Use this API to run the substation reliability analysis. It applies failure modes and affects analysis of arbitrary bus-breaker configurations and measures the impact of substation equipment failures upon the power transfer capability of the substation. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = sraind(options, values, labels, dfxfile, prbfile)
python_syntax: ierr = sraind(options, values, labels, dfxfile, prbfile)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying options. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying substation reliability assessment parameters. (input).

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying subsystem labels. (input).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Name of dfax data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: prbfile
parameters.description: Name of outage statistic data file. (input; no default allowed).

options.description: rating set (rating set program option setting by default).

values.description: percent of flow rating (>=0, 100.0, by default).
percent of peak load (>=0, 100.0, by default).
switching time in hours (>=0, 0.0, by default).
breaker failure rate in hours per year (>=0, 0.0, by default).

labels.description: label of substation subsystem (no default is allowed).
label of source subsystem (no default is allowed).
label of sink subsystem (no default is allowed).

error_codes.description: no outage Statistic Data File specified.
file is not in the form of a PSSE-25 or later DFAX file; run DFAX.
subsystem not found in DFAX data file.
source/sink buses not in substation subsystem.
error opening outage statistic data file.
